SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto

Class IssueReportRequest

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.IssueReportRequest
public class IssueReportRequest extends Object
Request body DTO for creating or updating an issue report.

Note: Images are uploaded separately after report creation; therefore, reportImages are not included here.
